prompt: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion photograph of a beautiful young South Asian woman in her early 20s at Hatirjheel, Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. The model is the only person in the scene, seated gracefully on wide stone steps beside the lake, facing the camera with a calm, confident expression. She has long straight chestnut-brown hair parted near the center, natural makeup, warm brown eyes, and soft even facial lighting. She wears a fitted beige ribbed long-sleeve knit top, high-waisted black tailored trousers, black flats, and a subtle wristwatch. Her pose: one leg bent upward, the other leg extended diagonally toward the foreground, one hand resting on her knee and the other hand placed on the step beside her. Behind her, show the reflective lake water glowing orange from sunset, a soft-focus bridge crossing the background, palm trees, manicured greenery, warm pathway lights, and a green signboard on the right reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা. Use shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, realistic skin texture, natural proportions, editorial fashion composition, warm cinematic color grading, and high-resolution DSLR detail. Keep the foreground completely clear: no men, no other women, no crowds, no tourists, no photographers, no vehicles, no extra people, no clutter, no watermark, no distorted hands, no extra limbs.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion photograph of a beautiful young South Asian woman in her early 20s at Hatirjheel, Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. The model is the only person in the scene, seated gracefully on wide stone steps beside the lake, facing the camera with a calm, confident expression. She has long straight chestnut-brown hair parted near the center, natural makeup, warm brown eyes, and soft even facial lighting. She wears a fitted beige ribbed long-sleeve knit top, high-waisted black tailored trousers, black flats, and a subtle wristwatch. Her pose: one leg bent upward, the other leg extended diagonally toward the foreground, one hand resting on her knee and the other hand placed on the step beside her. Behind her, show the reflective lake water glowing orange from sunset, a soft-focus bridge crossing the background, palm trees, manicured greenery, warm pathway lights, and a green signboard on the right reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা. Use shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, realistic skin texture, natural proportions, editorial fashion composition, warm cinematic color grading, and high-resolution DSLR detail. Keep the foreground completely clear: no men, no other women, no crowds, no tourists, no photographers, no vehicles, no extra people, no clutter, no watermark, no distorted hands, no extra limbs.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的时尚杂志风格照片，拍摄对象为 一位 20 岁出头、容貌姣好的南亚女性，地点位于孟加拉国达卡的 Hatirjheel，时间为黄金时刻。画面中仅有模特一人，她优雅地坐在湖边宽阔的石阶上，面朝镜头，神情从容自信。她留着栗棕色的长直发，中分，妆容自然，有着温暖的棕色双眸，面部光线柔和均匀。她身穿 一件修身的米色罗纹长袖针织衫、高腰黑色剪裁长裤，脚穿黑色平底鞋，佩戴着一块精致的手表。姿势要求：一条腿向上弯曲，另一条腿向前景斜向伸展，一只手放在膝盖上，另一只手放在身旁的台阶上。背景展示在日落余晖下泛着橙光的湖水、背景中虚化的桥梁、棕榈树、修剪整齐的绿植、温暖的步道灯，以及右侧一块写有 হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা 的绿色指示牌。采用浅景深和奶油般柔美的虚化效果，呈现真实的皮肤质感、自然的比例、时尚杂志的构图、温暖的电影级调色以及高分辨率的单反相机细节。保持前景完全清爽：没有男性、没有其他女性、没有人群、没有游客、没有摄影师、没有车辆、没有多余的人、没有杂物、没有水印、没有扭曲的手部、没有多余的肢体。
